query:
ALTER TABLE `panel_beaters`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_repairs` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_quality_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_cost_ratio` decimal(6,3) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_repair_duration_days` decimal(6,1) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `repeat_damage_rate_pct` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `warranty_repair_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `fraud_flag_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `performance_tier` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'A/B/C/D based on quality score',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `last_repair_date` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `performance_updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute ALTER TABLE `panel_beaters`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_repairs` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_quality_score` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_cost_ratio` decimal(6,3) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avg_repair_duration_days` decimal(6,1) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `repeat_damage_rate_pct` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `warranty_repair_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `fraud_flag_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `performance_tier` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'A/B/C/D based on quality score',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `last_repair_date` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `performance_updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL;
